full_name: EU Network and Information Security Directive 2 (NIS2) — Directive (EU) 2022/2555
authority: European Union Agency for Cybersecurity (ENISA) / National Authorities

controls.description: Organizations must implement appropriate and proportionate technical, operational, and organizational measures to manage cybersecurity risks.
controls.logic: FAIL if no cybersecurity_risk_assessment exists, or if last_assessment_date is older than 12 months, or if high_risks with no treatment_plan exist.

controls.description: The management body of the entity must approve cybersecurity risk management measures and oversee their implementation. Management can be held personally liable.
controls.logic: FAIL if no management_approval record exists for the cybersecurity_policy, or if management_training_on_cybersecurity = FALSE.

controls.description: Significant incidents must be reported: early warning within 24 hours, full notification within 72 hours, final report within 1 month.
controls.logic: FAIL if any significant_incident has early_warning_sent = FALSE and hours_since_detection > 24, or if full_notification_sent = FALSE and hours_since_detection > 72.

controls.description: Business continuity measures including backup management, disaster recovery, and crisis management must be in place.
controls.logic: FAIL if business_continuity_plan_exists = FALSE, or if backup_tested_date is older than 6 months, or if crisis_management_exercise_date older than 12 months.

controls.description: Security in the supply chain including the relationship between entities and their direct suppliers must be addressed.
controls.logic: FAIL if any critical supplier has no security_assessment, or if supplier contracts lack cybersecurity_requirements, or if review_date older than 12 months.

controls.description: Network and information system security measures must include network segmentation and access controls.
controls.logic: FAIL if critical systems are not in a segmented network zone, or if network_segmentation_policy = FALSE, or if direct internet access exists to core systems.

controls.description: Policies and procedures on the use of cryptography and, where appropriate, encryption must be in place.
controls.logic: FAIL if any sensitive data at rest or in transit lacks encryption, or if cryptography_policy_exists = FALSE, or if deprecated algorithms (MD5, SHA1, DES) are in use.

controls.description: Access control policies including multi-factor authentication and privileged access management must be implemented.
controls.logic: FAIL if mfa_enforced = FALSE for any essential or important entity system, or if privileged_access_monitoring = FALSE.

controls.requirement: Cybersecurity Awareness and Training for Staff
controls.description: Regular cybersecurity awareness training must be provided to all staff including management.
controls.logic: FAIL if any employee including management has cybersecurity_training_date older than 12 months, or if training_program_exists = FALSE.

controls.description: Organizations must have vulnerability handling and disclosure policies and conduct regular security assessments.
controls.logic: FAIL if vulnerability_disclosure_policy_exists = FALSE, or if last_security_assessment is older than 12 months, or if critical vulnerabilities unpatched > 30 days.
